description_long: This object is a compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, utilitarian design. The barrel is cylindrical and features a series of circular vent holes along the upper side, likely for heat dissipation. It has a prominent pistol grip and a vertical foregrip beneath the barrel, both designed for enhanced control and maneuverability. The receiver is blocky and streamlined, with minimal external attachments, giving it a modern, no-nonsense appearance. The trigger is housed within a simple, rounded guard, and the overall silhouette is short and stocky, suitable for close-quarters use. The construction appears to be primarily metal, with polymer or plastic components for the grips.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a vented barrel, pistol grip, and vertical foregrip, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, vented barrel, pistol grip, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and vent holes, with the vertical foregrip visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel and foregrip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vent holes along the upper side
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible reinforcement
